title: Hello! Hello!
content:
"Hello! hello!
        Come down below,--
        It's lovely and cool
        Out here in the pool;
        On a lily-pad float
        For a nice green boat.
        Here we sit and sing
        In a pleasant ring;
        Or leap frog play,
        In the jolliest way.
        Our games have begun,
        Come join in the fun."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Louisa May Alcott delivers a powerful performance in "Hello! Hello!"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
